| I suppose it's not surprising, team.

Donald Trump is a man who bragged about grabbing women and kissing them without consent. So it's no wonder he defends and supports Republicans accused of sexual assault.

This week, he did it again. | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e45/622b7b5b/7ed3d18/307ba675/842912143/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e1712sp")

Roy Moore is the Republican running for Senate in Alabama. **Moore has a number of sexual assault allegations against him, including from an underage girl.**

An endorsement of this man is an implicit admission from Trump that sexual assault doesn't matter -- that he cares more about the things he listed in that tweet than the victims of Moore's abuse.**It's reprehensible.

[_Join me in condemning Trump's tweet and demanding that he apologize to the women Moore abused._](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e45/622b7b5b/7ed3d18/307ba675/842912143/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e1712sp")**

In solidarity,

Debbie
